LAST_DONE:    Super Admin Panel backend shipped — commit 39fc6a1 on origin/main
              adds the platform tRPC router foundation (697 insertions across
              4 files). User scoped this slice to "backend only" via
              AskUserQuestion; Manage-button tenant-switching deferred to a
              focused future batch.

              Files added:
                apps/web/src/server/trpc/middleware/require-platform-admin.ts
                  (18 LoC — platformAdminProcedure gate: super_admin role +
                  empty-string tenantId session, throws FORBIDDEN otherwise.
                  Note tenantId is always string per edge auth marshalling
                  null → "").
                apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/platform.ts
                  (216 LoC — 5 procedures using platformPrisma (no L6
                  tenant-guard, per security.md superadmin rules):
                    platform.list        — tenants + userCount via _count +
                                           30d eventCount via Promise.all of
                                           per-tenant event.count
                    platform.metrics     — totalTenants / totalUsers /
                                           totalEvents via 3 parallel count()
                    platform.create      — slug uniqueness gate (CONFLICT),
                                           slug regex /^[a-z0-9](?:[a-z0-9-]
                                           *[a-z0-9])?$/, default UTC + IDR
                    platform.update      — partial patch over name/timezone/
                                           currency/syncFrequencySeconds with
                                           NOT_FOUND guard
                    platform.deactivate  — soft-delete via isActive=false,
                                           NOT_FOUND + BAD_REQUEST guards
                  Every mutation writes a PLATFORM:-prefixed AuditLog with
                  tenantId=null via writeAuditLog(platformPrisma, ...) — the
                  helper signature matches packages/db/src/helpers/audit.ts.)
                apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/__tests__/platform.test.ts
                  (461 LoC — 18 vitest cases across 5 describe blocks: auth
                  gate (3 failure modes: non-super_admin, super_admin in
                  tenant context, no session), list aggregation + empty list,
                  metrics totals, create happy path + 3 validation failures,
                  update partial-patch + NOT_FOUND + audit log shape,
                  deactivate happy path + NOT_FOUND + already-deactivated.
                  File-level eslint-disable for @typescript-eslint/unbound-
                  method + no-unnecessary-type-assertion — required because
                  platformPrisma is a plain PrismaClient (no extensions) so
                  ESLint sees the methods directly, unlike user.test.ts where
                  the wrapped prisma client masks them. Comment in the file
                  explains the convention for future tests of unextended
                  clients.)

              Files modified:
                apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/index.ts
                  (+2 LoC — import platformRouter, register as
                  `platform: platformRouter` at the top of appRouter object)

                pnpm exec eslint src/server/trpc/    → 0 errors
